## Another Paradox game?

The engine is game-agnostic — supporting a new game usually needs only a new
`games/<game>.conf`. If that's your request, please include:

- Game name:
- Steam AppID (from the store URL `store.steampowered.com/app/<APPID>/`):
- macOS `.app` bundle name (e.g. `eu4.app`):
- Where it installs (default and any external-drive paths):
